scripts.dev: pnpm run app:cloud & wait-on tcp:9899 && pnpm run app:cloud:web & pnpm run app:player & wait
scripts.dev:node: set -a; . ./.env 2>/dev/null; set +a; PORT=1530 cargo run -p mhaol-node --bin mhaol-node
scripts.dev:cloud: set -a; . ./.env 2>/dev/null; set +a; HOST=127.0.0.1 PORT=9899 cargo run -p mhaol-cloud --bin mhaol-cloud
scripts.build:cloud: pnpm --filter cloud build && cargo build --release --bin mhaol-cloud
scripts.test: pnpm -r run test && cargo test -p mhaol-node
scripts.check: pnpm -r run check && cargo check -p mhaol-node && cargo check -p mhaol-cloud
scripts.clean:ports: for p in 1530 1570 1571 9595 9898 9899; do lsof -ti:$p 2>/dev/null | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; done; true
scripts.clean: pnpm clean:ports; pnpm -r run clean && cargo clean && rm -f mhaol.db mhaol.db-wal mhaol.db-shm apps/node/mhaol.db apps/node/mhaol.db-wal apps/node/mhaol.db-shm
scripts.app:node: set -a; . ./.env 2>/dev/null; set +a; PORT=1530 cargo run -p mhaol-node --bin mhaol-node
scripts.app:cloud: set -a; . ./.env 2>/dev/null; set +a; HOST=127.0.0.1 PORT=9899 cargo run -p mhaol-cloud --bin mhaol-cloud
scripts.tauri:android:dev: adb reverse tcp:9595 tcp:9595; cd apps/tauri/src-tauri && cargo tauri android dev
scripts.tauri:android:build: cd apps/tauri/src-tauri && cargo tauri android build
scripts.tauri:android:build:apk: cd apps/tauri/src-tauri && cargo tauri android build --apk
scripts.android:dev: adb reverse tcp:1530 tcp:1530; cd apps/frontend && cargo tauri android dev
scripts.android:build: cd apps/frontend && cargo tauri android build
scripts.android:build:apk: cd apps/frontend && cargo tauri android build --apk
scripts.install:deps: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y build-essential pkg-config libssl-dev libonig-dev libgstreamer1.0-dev libgstreamer-plugins-base1.0-dev libgstreamer-plugins-bad1.0-dev gstreamer1.0-plugins-base gstreamer1.0-plugins-good gstreamer1.0-plugins-bad gstreamer1.0-plugins-ugly gstreamer1.0-libav
